patch.value: First-party exemplar package for registerCommand + registerFlags + registerParser (commands capability pattern)

Existing first-party exemplars cover: importers (pm-todos/pm-beads), hooks (pm-lifecycle-hooks, pm-governance-audit), search (pm-search-advanced). Missing: a worked example of the `commands` capability that shows registerCommand with a full CommandDefinition (name, description, intent, arguments, flags, examples, failure_hints) + registerFlags to add flags to an existing command + registerParser to preprocess options. pm-linked-test-adapters uses commands+schema but its focus is test-run adapters; it doesn't demonstrate the parser or flag-injection patterns. A standalone pm-shell-commands or augmented pm-guide-shell exemplar would give authors a copy-paste pattern.

- A first-party exemplar package demonstrates registerCommand + registerFlags + registerParser
- Ships hand-maintained .js alongside .ts (per ADR pm-tsio)
- Listed in marketplace.json + docs; smoke-tested

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit 2026-06-07 (SDK agent F2/F3): 7 of 13 registration APIs have NO first-party exemplar (registerParser, registerPreflight, registerRenderer, registerItemTypes, registerItemFields, registerVectorStoreAdapter, registerMigration). The custom item-type path (the 'any kind of project' differentiator) is prose-only in SDK.md. The scaffold (extension/scaffold.ts) only emits registerCommand + capabilities:['commands']. Suggest a pm-incident exemplar (Incident type + severity field + renderer + parser/preflight) and richer scaffold capability stubs.

value.author: packages-agent
value.text: Starting: building commands-capability exemplar package (registerCommand full CommandDefinition + registerFlags + registerParser), modeled on pm-todos/pm-guide-shell.

value.author: packages-agent
value.text: DONE: new exemplar package packages/pm-command-kit (alias command-kit, extension builtin-command-kit, capabilities commands+schema+parser). Demonstrates: (1) registerCommand with FULL CommandDefinition for 'command-kit echo' (name/action/description/intent/required-variadic argument/4 flags incl number default + list:true accumulation/3 examples/2 failure_hints/pure run handler); (2) registerParser rewriting deprecated --shout to --upper, coercing --repeat to positive int, trim+dedupe --decorations; (3) registerFlags injecting inert --kit-note into core 'pm list'. Import-free hand-maintained index.js + type-only-import index.ts (lifecycle-hooks pattern), strict sandbox manifest (all permissions false), README anatomy walkthrough. DECISION: did NOT add it to marketplace.json/.claude-plugin/.agents-plugins marketplaces — those are Claude Code PLUGIN marketplaces (pm-claude/pm-codex), not pm package catalogs; pm packages are auto-discovered from packages/pm-* by bundled-catalog.ts (verified: catalog total=10 + wildcard install via real loader AND dist CLI). Drift-lock claude-plugin-contract.spec.ts run green untouched. Smoke tests merged into extension-command.spec.ts (registration surface + parser/run behavior + real install/activate); catalog/wildcard counts updated 9 to 10 there and in cli.integration.spec.ts. tsc -p tsconfig.packages.json clean for my files.

value.note: command-kit exemplar link from SDK docs

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Sidecar evidence: docs/package consistency sidecar found missing SDK.md link to pm-command-kit; fixed by linking docs/SDK.md to packages/pm-command-kit/README.md and reran pnpm quality:docs-links plus package/command focused tests.

value.note: dynamic extension flag bootstrap and arg stripping

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Manual smoke caught and fixed command-kit integration bugs: lazy activation now includes core command flag injection, extension-provided flags are registered with Commander before parse, and package-owned command flags are stripped from context.args while retained in context.options. Temp smoke now passes install command-kit, command-kit echo --upper --repeat 2, list --kit-note, and package doctor.

patch.value: contract snapshot for dynamic extension flag parsing

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Verification note: first post-gate temp smoke used stale init flags (--name/--description), which correctly failed option validation. Rerunning with current init contract before closeout.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: Final verification evidence: pnpm build, pnpm typecheck, pnpm contracts:check, pnpm quality:static, pnpm quality:docs-links, pnpm security:scan, pnpm audit --audit-level low, node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (149 files, 2619 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines), pnpm changelog:pm:check, pm health --check-only --summary, pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift, Sentry/telemetry gate (critical=0 high=0 telemetry ok), and isolated temp smoke for command-kit install/echo/list flag/package doctor all passed. Residual validation warning is the known pre-existing 116 older closed items missing resolution fields; history drift is clean.

patch.value: Added pm-command-kit exemplar package and fixed runtime support for dynamic command/core flag parsing.
Package authors have a first-party registerCommand/registerFlags/registerParser exemplar that works when installed.
packages/pm-command-kit demonstrates command, parser, and flag APIs; temp smoke installed and exercised it successfully.
Command-kit SDK exemplar completed and verified.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: PR #152 Gemini feedback fix: extension-provided boolean flags now register with Commander without optional value suffixes, with regression coverage for command-kit echo --upper hello preserving hello as the positional message.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: PR #152 Gemini follow-up fix: stripLooseCommandOptionTokens now preserves positional arguments after boolean extension flags, and command-kit runEchoCommand defensively handles missing/null args/options. Focused tests cover --upper hello and malformed context behavior; full coverage rerun remains 100%.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: PR #152 Gemini final follow-up fix: dynamic option registration now treats valueless flags as boolean, non-boolean/required flags as required-value options, and stripLooseCommandOptionTokens respects the -- option separator. Focused integration tests and full coverage rerun pass.

value.author: codex-implementation-agent
value.text: PR #152 final reviewer-follow-up verification: focused extension tests passed (5 files, 200 tests); full coverage passed 149 files / 2621 tests at 100% statements, branches, functions, and lines; isolated temp smoke passed for init, install command-kit, command-kit echo --upper hello --repeat 2 --json, list --kit-note smoke --json, and package doctor --project --detail deep --json.
